scripts.build:client: bun build src/client/table/VirtualGridTable.ts src/client/table/virtual-grid-table.page.ts src/client/analytics/analytics.page.ts --outdir public/js --target browser --format iife
scripts.build:client:watch: bun build src/client/table/VirtualGridTable.ts src/client/table/virtual-grid-table.page.ts src/client/analytics/analytics.page.ts --outdir public/js --target browser --format iife --watch
scripts.dev: bun run build:client && bun run --watch src/server.ts
scripts.start: bun run build:client && bun run src/server.ts
